book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.

lineage: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
That faith is of advantage altogether, and that we can do as much as we believe.

title: That faith is of advantage altogether, and that we can do as much as we believe.

source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That faith is of advantage altogether, and that we can do as much as we believe.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In Genesis: “And Abraham believed God, and it was counted unto him for righteousness.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in Isaiah: “And if ye do not believe, neither shall ye understand.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the Gospel according to Matthew: “O thou of little faith, wherefore didst thou doubt?”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the same place: “If you have faith as a grain of mustard seed, ye shall say to this mountain, Pass over from here to that place, and it shall pass over; and nothing shall be impossible unto you.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also according to Mark: “All things whatsoever ye pray and ask for, believe that ye shall receive them, and they shall be yours.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the same place: “All things are possible to him that believeth.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In Habakkuk: “But the righteous liveth by my faith.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in Daniel: “Ananias, Azarias, and Misael, trusting in God, were delivered from the fiery flame.”
